# Curator Receipt

## Decision

This source is kept because it is a research preprint with explicit benchmark evaluations and reported performance results.

## Why

The excerpt presents a formal arXiv manuscript and includes concrete empirical substance: named benchmarks, evaluation metrics, implementation details, baselines, and a results table with benchmark scores across SimpleQA, GAIA, and HLE. That clears the admission bar for institute-worthy empirical material.

## Limits
